summary: Dropdown Portal Fix VERIFIED - Reminders and Concierge® dropdowns now render correctly using React createPortal. Both dropdowns appear visible when clicked and are not clipped by parent overflow:auto container. All 5 test flows passed.
critical_code_review_comments: createPortal correctly used to render dropdowns to document.body (lines 288-356 and 415-470)
position:fixed with calculated coordinates ensures proper positioning
z-index: 9999 ensures dropdowns appear above all content
Click outside handling works correctly via useEffect with mousedown/touchstart listeners
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dropdown portal fix verified working. MiraTopBar dropdowns use createPortal from react-dom to render to document.body, bypassing overflow clipping issues. data-testid selectors: reminders-btn, reminders-dropdown, concierge-btn, concierge-dropdown, history-btn.

tested_flows.notes: Successfully logged in with test credentials and navigated to /mira-demo

tested_flows.flow: Reminders dropdown opens and shows list
tested_flows.notes: Click on [data-testid='reminders-btn'] opens dropdown with 4 reminders including '3 urgent' badge. Dropdown rendered via portal at position top=355.75, width=764

tested_flows.flow: Reminders dropdown closes on outside click
tested_flows.notes: Clicking elsewhere correctly closes the Reminders dropdown

tested_flows.flow: Concierge® dropdown opens with contact options
tested_flows.notes: Click on [data-testid='concierge-btn'] opens dropdown with WhatsApp, Chat, Email options. Dropdown rendered via portal at position top=355.75, width=380
Click on [data-testid='history-btn'] opens .mp-past-chats panel with 'Start New Chat' button

observations.portal_implementation: Dropdowns use createPortal to render directly to document.body, bypassing any parent overflow clipping
observations.position_calculation: Button bounding rect used to calculate dropdown position (rect.bottom + 8 for top, centered on button)
observations.z_index: z-index:9999 ensures visibility above all other elements

bug_status: RESOLVED - Dropdown visibility issue fixed via React Portal
